'''jotazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zombieless|zombieless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zombieless|zombieless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jotazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jotazhithi|jotazhithi]] || [[word:jotazhiji|jotazhiji]] || [[word:jotazhishi|jotazhishi]] || [[word:jotazhiki|jotazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jotazhuthuthu|jotazhuthuthu]] || [[word:jotazhujuju|jotazhujuju]] || [[word:jotazhushushu|jotazhushushu]] || [[word:jotazhukuku|jotazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jotazhuthu|jotazhuthu]] || [[word:jotazhuju|jotazhuju]] || [[word:jotazhushu|jotazhushu]] || [[word:jotazhuku|jotazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jotazhufthuf|jotazhufthuf]] || [[word:jotazhufjuf|jotazhufjuf]] || [[word:jotazhufshuf|jotazhufshuf]] || [[word:jotazhufkuf|jotazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jotazhethe|jotazhethe]] || [[word:jotazheje|jotazheje]] || [[word:jotazheshe|jotazheshe]] || [[word:jotazheke|jotazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jotazhothotho|jotazhothotho]] || [[word:jotazhojojo|jotazhojojo]] || [[word:jotazhoshosho|jotazhoshosho]] || [[word:jotazhokoko|jotazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jotazhotho|jotazhotho]] || [[word:jotazhojo|jotazhojo]] || [[word:jotazhosho|jotazhosho]] || [[word:jotazhoko|jotazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jotazhofthof|jotazhofthof]] || [[word:jotazhofjof|jotazhofjof]] || [[word:jotazhofshof|jotazhofshof]] || [[word:jotazhofkof|jotazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jotazhïfthïf|jotazhïfthïf]] || [[word:jotazhïfjïf|jotazhïfjïf]] || [[word:jotazhïfshïf|jotazhïfshïf]] || [[word:jotazhïfkïf|jotazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jotazhïfthïfthïf|jotazhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:jotazhïfjïfjïf|jotazhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:jotazhïfshïfshïf|jotazhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:jotazhïfkïfkïf|jotazhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jotazhïfthïf|jotazhïfthïf]] || [[word:jotazhïfjïf|jotazhïfjïf]] || [[word:jotazhïfshïf|jotazhïfshïf]] || [[word:jotazhïfkïf|jotazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jotazhïfthïf|jotazhïfthïf]] || [[word:jotazhïfjïf|jotazhïfjïf]] || [[word:jotazhïfshïf|jotazhïfshïf]] || [[word:jotazhïfkïf|jotazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jotazhæthæ|jotazhæthæ]] || [[word:jotazhæjæ|jotazhæjæ]] || [[word:jotazhæshæ|jotazhæshæ]] || [[word:jotazhækæ|jotazhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jotazhathatha|jotazhathatha]] || [[word:jotazhajaja|jotazhajaja]] || [[word:jotazhashasha|jotazhashasha]] || [[word:jotazhakaka|jotazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jotazhatha|jotazhatha]] || [[word:jotazhaja|jotazhaja]] || [[word:jotazhasha|jotazhasha]] || [[word:jotazhaka|jotazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jotazhafthaf|jotazhafthaf]] || [[word:jotazhafjaf|jotazhafjaf]] || [[word:jotazhafshaf|jotazhafshaf]] || [[word:jotazhafkaf|jotazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jotazhasha|jotazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jotazhshësha|jotazhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jotazhrosha|jotazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jotazhmusha|jotazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jotazhyasha|jotazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojotazhnkshësha|gojotazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojotazhnkrosha|gojotazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojotazhnkmusha|gojotazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojotazhnkyasha|gojotazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jotatazhasha|jotatazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jotatazhshësha|jotatazhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jotatazhrosha|jotatazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jotatazhmusha|jotatazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jotatazhyasha|jotatazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojotatazhnkshësha|gojotatazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojotatazhnkrosha|gojotatazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojotatazhnkmusha|gojotatazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojotatazhnkyasha|gojotatazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jetæzhasha|jetæzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jetæzhshësha|jetæzhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jetæzhrosha|jetæzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jetæzhmusha|jetæzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jetæzhyasha|jetæzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojetæzhnkshësha|gojetæzhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojetæzhnkrosha|gojetæzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojetæzhnkmusha|gojetæzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojetæzhnkyasha|gojetæzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jotfazhasha|jotfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jotfazhshësha|jotfazhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jotfazhrosha|jotfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jotfazhmusha|jotfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jotfazhyasha|jotfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojotfazhnkshësha|gojotfazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojotfazhnkrosha|gojotfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojotfazhnkmusha|gojotfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojotfazhnkyasha|gojotfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
